description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. Add a test-with-py2 job in the test stage using the python:2.7 image that runs export ONLY_TEST_PY2=1, python --version, pip install -r requirements.txt, and ./src/gen.py all -t. Add a test-with-py3 job in the test stage using the python:3.6 image that runs export ONLY_TEST_PY3=1, python --version, pip install -r requirements.txt, and ./src/gen.py all -t. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage using the python:3.6 image, limited to tag pipelines, that sends a POST request with Authorization Bearer $DEPLOY_API_TOKEN to https://api.metachris.com/tasks/deploy-python-boilerplate, saves the response to response.txt, outputs it with cat, and greps for msg. No caches or artifacts are defined.
